---
title: "Making the expanded meta table"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
meta <- read_csv('../data/153_combined_META.csv')
```
# CI

```{r}
cleaned_ci_data <- read_csv('../data/R43_cleaned_ci_data_diet.csv') %>% select(pid, ci_cleaned_numeric)
```

```{r}
pt_disease_lineage <- read_csv('../data/R43_cleaned_patients_disease_lineage.csv')
```
